span.p: Family B — record lifecycle states, section 5.1

span.p: Family A — schema dispatch states (record_state field), section 6.2

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Family A and Family B are TWO distinct
state families and must NOT be merged.
drafted (Family A, past tense, schema state)
is NOT draft (Family B, lifecycle state).
Supersession: supersedes (original retained
in full). Seal: seal_hash.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
affirmed is NOT a separate enum field. It is
reached when affirmation_record + seal_hash
are populated per section 5.1(3); the record
is sealed simultaneously.

svg.text: Figure 5-1 — Decision-Record State Machine: Two Distinct State Families (faithful to substrate v5.1.0)
